description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel rectangular case, has silver screw details Dial style: Black dial with silver and white coloured hands and numbering Strap style: Steel bracelet with a butterfly clasp Features: Screw to reset time, date aperture at the 3 hour mark Water resistant up to 3 ATMThis watch comes in a signature Ssteele case Warranty: 1 year
